1. In `check_and_display_plan_issue_closure()` function: - `plan_id = ctx.plan_backend.resolve_plan_id_for_branch(...)` → `pr_id = ctx.plan_backend.resolve_plan_id_for_branch(...)` (line 34) - `if plan_id is None:` → `if pr_id is None:` (line 35) - `plan_number = int(plan_id)` → `pr_number = int(pr_id)` (line 38) - All uses of `plan_number` within the function → `pr_number` (lines 42, 46, 50, 52) - `result = ctx.plan_store.get_plan(repo_root, plan_id)` → `result = ctx.plan_store.get_plan(repo_root, pr_id)` (line 40) - `ctx.plan_store.close_plan(repo_root, plan_id)` → `ctx.plan_store.close_plan(repo_root, pr_id)` (line 50)
2. In `run_objective_update_after_close()`: - Parameter `plan_number: int` → `pr_number: int` (line 79) - Use `plan_number` → `pr_number` (line 91)
Do NOT rename: - `ctx.plan_backend.resolve_plan_id_for_branch()` method name - that's the method name on the backend - `ctx.plan_store.get_plan()` method name - `ctx.plan_store.close_plan()` method name - `PlanNotFound`, `PlanState` type names - `get_objective_for_branch()` - unchanged - `get_plan_for_branch()` method name on plan_backend

## Summary of Changes
### In `check_and_display_plan_issue_closure()`: - Line 34: `plan_id` → `pr_id` (assignment from `resolve_plan_id_for_branch()`) - Line 35: `plan_id` → `pr_id` (None check) - Line 38: `plan_number` → `pr_number` (int conversion) - Line 40: `plan_id` → `pr_id` (get_plan parameter) - Line 42: `plan_number` → `pr_number` (debug log) - Line 46: `plan_number` → `pr_number` (user output) - Line 47: `plan_number` → `pr_number` (return value) - Line 50: `plan_id` → `pr_id` (close_plan parameter) - Line 51: `plan_number` → `pr_number` (user output) - Line 53: `plan_number` → `pr_number` (return value)
### In `run_objective_update_after_close()`: - Line 79: Parameter `plan_number: int` → `pr_number: int` - Line 91: `plan_number` → `pr_number` (used in command string)
All method names and type names were preserved as requested.
